concerns.text: The `knot_id` pattern in `contracts/knot_record.schema.yaml` (`"^KNOT_[0-9]+_[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$"`) conflicts with the `knot_id` description in `data-model.md` (e.g., "3_1"). This identifier format mismatch means data generated per the plan will not validate against the contract schema.

The field naming for the alternating classification differs: `data-model.md` uses `alternating` (boolean), while `contracts/knot_record.schema.yaml` defines `is_alternating`. The plan references the former, so records produced will not conform to the contract schema.
